name: golsp
description: Go language server (gopls) for Claude Code LSP support
run_commands: bash -c 'curl -s -S -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/moovweb/gvm/master/binscripts/gvm-installer | bash && source /home/vscode/.gvm/scripts/gvm && gvm install go1.25.7 -B && gvm use go1.25.7 --default && go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest'
post_install_message:
To enable gopls inside the container, run this command in Claude Code:
  /plugin install gopls-lsp@claude-plugins-official

For more information on LSP plugins: https://www.amazingcto.com/lsp-in-claude/
